# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Users on phones should be able to use all project editor controls without horizontal overflow or cramped rows.

## Success Criteria

- No major overflow in the project editor on mobile.
- Long control rows wrap or stack cleanly.
- Inputs remain usable and readable.

## UX Notes

- Prefer vertical stacking over squeezed horizontal layouts.
- Keep touch targets comfortable.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- Some desktop layouts may become slightly more stacked, but mobile clarity is the priority.
